title: Security keys & passkeys (WebAuthn)
description: Register a passkey, security key or your device's fingerprint/face unlock as a phishing-resistant second factor. The private key never leaves your authenticator.

list.empty: You have no registered authenticators yet. Add one to use it as a second factor at sign-in.
list.deleteConfirm: Remove "{{nickname}}"? You will no longer be able to sign in with this authenticator.

register.title: Register an authenticator
register.description: Your browser will ask you to use a security key, your fingerprint/face, or a saved passkey.

errors.unsupported: This browser does not support WebAuthn. Try a recent version of Chrome, Edge, Firefox or Safari.
errors.cancelled: Registration was cancelled or timed out. Please try again.
errors.failed: Could not register the authenticator. Please try again.
errors.notFound: That authenticator could not be found. The list may be out of date - refresh and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

siteSettings.title: Security keys & passkeys (WebAuthn) - {{siteKey}}
siteSettings.description: Choose whether WebAuthn is active on this site and which groups it applies to. Whether registration is REQUIRED is a platform-wide setting (enforcedFactors in the org.jahia.modules.mfa.extensions configuration).
siteSettings.noSite: No site context available. Open this page from a site's administration panel.

enabled.label: Enable WebAuthn on this site
enabled.help: When on, users who have registered an authenticator are prompted for it at login.

groups.label: Restrict to groups (optional)
groups.help: Comma-separated group names. If set, the policy applies only to members of these groups. Leave empty to apply to all users of the site.

reset.title: Reset a user's WebAuthn
reset.help: Remove all of a user's registered authenticators when they have lost their devices. The user will be able to register again at next login.
reset.confirmText: This will immediately remove all of {{userId}}'s registered authenticators. They will sign in without a second factor until they re-register. This cannot be undone.
reset.done: The user's WebAuthn authenticators have been removed.

audit.title: Security keys & passkeys (WebAuthn)
audit.reportSummary: {{registered}} of {{total}} users have registered an authenticator.

errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to change these settings.
errors.notAuthenticated: Please sign in again to change these settings.
errors.invalidUrl: The login/logout URL must be a relative path starting with / (e.g. /sites/mySite/login.html). Absolute or external URLs are not allowed.
errors.generic: Could not save the settings. Please try again.
